rulings.Case Title: VY NGUYEN VS. ROBERT A. PIKE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 7, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT JANET KRAHLING, PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, Amended Motion on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VY NGUYEN VS. ROBERT A. PIKE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint By Pui And Janet Krahling
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 7, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT JANET KRAHLING, PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL, INC. Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint By Pui And Janet Krahling GRANTED. Motion is GRANTED without leave to amend as to request of return the purchase price, rescission, restoration, and attachment; and order compelling arbitration. No oppositions filed. Motion is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith (1) facts (not conclusions) giving rise to recovery of attorneys' fees under "tort of another" theory; allegations to be made in light of cases cited by Defendant on pages 8-9 of reply; (2) amend for P to allege facts showing non-speculative lost profits on the unit at issue in this action that are recoverable under any measure of damages; (3) to allege facts to support "potential" future losses, e.g. facts showing that HOA assessments are not merely speculative. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOANG NGUYEN VS. ENTRA DEFAULT SOLUTIONS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 7, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT ENTRA DEFAULT SOLUTIONS, LLC, BSI FINANCIAL SERVICES, CAM XV TRUST Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED. Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege facts showing that Plaintiff is not estopped from bringing this action under Hamilton v. Greenwich Investors (2011) 195 Cal.App.4th 1602; (2) to allege facts in good faith (and in light of Ex.12 to Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice) showing that no contact pre-recordation of NOD was made and that no contact has been made since, i.e. to allege facts showing that HBOR remedy of injunction is not moot. Motion as to all causes of action based on Plaintiff's challenge to Defendant's authority to foreclose is GRANTED without leave to amend. Plaintiff has not standing to challenge Defendants' authority pre-foreclosure. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to amend. All parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to do so will result in motion being taken off calendar or treated as unopposed. = (501/REQ)
